mainEntity.name: Do I really need schema markup for AEO best practices?

acceptedAnswer.text: Schema helps answer engines understand what your page contains, but it does not replace good content. The most useful types for AEO are FAQPage, HowTo, Article, Product, Organization, and Author, as long as the markup matches what users can actually see on the page.
acceptedAnswer.description: Schema is strongly recommended because it helps answer engines interpret your content. Use it only when it accurately reflects visible page content, especially for FAQs, how-tos, and articles.
